layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 to gap-6

components.buttons: Flat, sharp or slightly rounded corners (max 8px), strong contrast. Hover states translate-y-[-2px] with shadow-md.
components.cards: Flat background (surface color), 1px solid border (#E5E2D9), no heavy shadows. Internal padding p-6 or p-8.
components.header: Crystal glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80, 1px bottom border (#E5E2D9).
components.vet_estimate_uploader: Dashed border area (border-primary/50), bg-surface, generous p-12 padding, drag-drop interactions.
components.red_flag_chips: Urgent/Red Flag: bg-red-100 text-red-800. Warning: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800. Neutral: bg-stone-200 text-stone-800.
components.script_generator: Soft sage background, monospace or clean serif text area for the script, copy button.
components.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, cards).

hero_image.description: Magazine-style collage of diverse pets, warm studio lighting.
hero_image.placement: Marketing landing page hero section right column/bento block.

reassuring_care_image.description: Reassuring hand petting a golden retriever in warm light.

vet_bill_flatlay.description: Minimalist flat lay of a printed vet bill on a textured linen table.
vet_bill_flatlay.placement: Upload Estimate or How It Works section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Hybrid Fullstack app with a landing page and an authenticated dashboard.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Do not use Inter for headings.
Follow the Organic & Earthy palette. Avoid generic purple or pure white.
Implement the landing page hero with a bento grid or asymmetrical layout. Use the provided 'hero_image'.
Build the dashboard with the 'Control Room' grid (dense, cardless or 1px border cards, no soft shadows).
Ensure the upload feature has a drag-and-drop UI with clear feedback.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
Do not use Shadcn for the marketing page layout structure (use HTML/Tailwind). Use customized Shadcn for dashboard components.
Ensure safety disclaimers are visible but subtle.
